chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 334 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «تَقْبِضُ بِيَدِكَ عَلَى لِحْيَتِكَ وَ تَجُزُّ مَا فَضَلَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.334 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Hold your beard with your hand (in a fist) and trim what is excess."
